scenarios.name: pricing-query-in-opener

history.content: Hi, thanks for calling MRI First. How can I help you today?
How much does an MRI cost?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks one filler phrase then calls universal_router intent='info_pivot'. Must NOT call get_service_price. Must NOT ask what type of scan.

scenarios.name: shoulder-pricing-in-opener

history.content: Hi, thanks for calling MRI First. How can I help you today?
What's the price for a shoulder MRI?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks one filler phrase then calls universal_router intent='info_pivot'. Must NOT call get_service_price and must NOT ask any disambiguation question about shoulder type.

scenarios.name: booking-intent-not-affected

history.content: Hi, thanks for calling MRI First. How can I help you today?
I'd like to book a knee MRI please.

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks one gentle ack then calls universal_router intent='book_intent' with implied_service='knee MRI'. Pricing override must NOT interfere with booking intent.

scenarios.name: contact-clinic-name-known

history.content: Hi Lisa, you've reached MRI First — you're speaking with AI Jane. How can I help you today?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent says the CONTACT CLINIC opener ('I'm not able to transfer your call to reception, but I can pass on a message for them to call you back.') and HALTS. Must NOT ask 'Can I get your name?' or any name-collection question in this same turn. Caller's name (Lisa) is already known from the greeting — NAME STEP must be skipped. No tool call this turn.

scenarios.name: contact-clinic-name-unknown

history.content: Hi, you've reached MRI First — you're speaking with AI Jane. How can I help you today?
Can I speak to someone at reception?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent says the CONTACT CLINIC opener and HALTS. Does NOT ask for name in this same turn (multi-step: one step per turn). On the NEXT turn NAME STEP would fire and ask for name since it's unknown. No tool call this turn.

scenarios.name: booking-intent-ack-only-no-bridge-text

history.content: You've reached MRI First AI receptionist! How can I help you today?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks ONE gentle formal ack only ('Wonderful!' / 'Lovely!' / 'Of course!') then IMMEDIATELY calls universal_router intent='book_intent'. Must NOT add any bridging text ('Let me pull up your details', 'I'll get you booked in'), must NOT ask 'are you a new patient?', and must NOT ask any question before the tool call. The ack word is the entire spoken output in Part 1.
